rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from missing extended ratio tokens and correctly prescribe the hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml workaround confirmed in-thread. Y is better grounded (cites specific line ranges, quotes deploy YAML pipeline/header fields, gives a concrete tolerant-guard code fix) and gets the disposition right (issue resolved/closeable, improvement tracked in a new issue) matching Gaohan123's actual request, whereas X's 'keep-open' disposition misreads that request. X offers only a prose guard suggestion with no code, and slightly thinner evidence.
